function.message: I could not safely complete the oldest inbox request because only one of the two referenced projects is present as a canonical project record. I found and read the map wall project at `40_projects/2026_04_30_family_map_wall/README.MD`, but I could not find a canonical `40_projects/.../README.MD` for “attic rainwater rig,” so I cannot compare two project start dates or choose a deletion target without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read workflow docs before task work, used canonical project lane, and did not perform destructive action without uniquely supported evidence.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because required data is missing: the inbox request needs two project start dates, but only one canonical project record was found. Deletion-and-wiping workflow requires clarification when visible evidence does not uniquely support deletion.
